mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO data_category_detail (data_category_no, `key`, value_type, value, trial_value, version, is_delete, create_at, update_at) VALUES
( #{item.dataCategoryNo}, #{item.key}, #{item.valueType}, #{item.value}, #{item.trialValue}, #{item.version}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.createAt}, #{item.updateAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT data_category_no, `key`, value_type, `value` FROM data_category_detail WHERE data_category_no = #{no} AND is_delete = 0
